title: chrysanthemum palmatum
intro: Chrysanthemum palmatum, also known as the Japanese fern-leaf chrysanthemum or the Asian chrysanthemum, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family, characterized by its fern-like leaves and vibrant yellow flowers. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries, valued for its medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which are attributed to its flavonoid and triterpenoid compounds. The health benefits of this plant include reducing fever, relieving headaches and digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Chrysanthemum palmatum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional remedies to enhance its medicinal properties.
